title: H-Null Modularity FAIL: missing honest negatives
_fixture_purpose: FAIL: Missing honest_negatives section triggers HN_HONEST check. A Tier 2 cert MUST declare limitations.

h_null_model.definition: H(b,e) = C + F where C = 2*d*e, F = d*d - e*e
h_null_model.degree_mapping: b = max(k_i, k_j), e = min(k_i, k_j), d = b + e
h_null_model.chromogeometry: H = C + F = green + red quadrance

fail_ledger.message: honest_negatives section missing — Tier 2 cert requires declared limitations
